calendar.matters:
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating And Monetary Sanctions For Plaintiffs Failure To Comply With Court Order Compelling Discovery
Off Calendar May-16-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GARY MITCHELL, TRICIA MARTINEZ's Motion For Terminating And Monetary Sanctions For Plaintiffs Failure To Comply With Court Order Compelling Discovery.

No opposition is filed. It appears from the file that the plaintiff has been nonresponsive to his counsel for many months. The motion for terminating sanctions is GRANTED.

Order signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion For Contempt For Failure To Appear At Deposition And Motion To Compel Manmeet Sarang To Answer Questions At Deposition And To Produce For Inspection Described In Notice Of Taking Deposition And For Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Manmeet Sarang
Off Calendar Feb-02-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Alston Lew, Esq. 925-825-9500 for Defendant GARY MITCHELL, TRICIA MARTINEZ.
No Other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GARY MITCHELL, TRICIA MARTINEZ's Motion For Contempt For Failure To Appear At Deposition And Motion To Compel Manmeet Sarang To Answer Questions At Deposition And To Produce For Inspection Described In Notice Of Taking Deposition And For Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Manmeet Sarang.

The motion to compel Plaintiff to attend his deposition is granted. Plaintiff shall attend a deposition and produce responsive documents no later than April 3, 2018 at a time mutually agreed upon by Counsel. Failure to attend the deposition may lead to imposition of terminating sanctions upon further motion. Sanctions in the amount $760 awarded to Defendants. The motion for contempt is denied without prejudice to re-filing if Plaintiff does not comply with this Court order.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/JPT/HK)
